name: White Lace Cafe
description:
This is the White Lace Cafe, a den of sin and depravity. It’s a cafe for patrons to come and commit acts of sin for the sake of committing them, and those who wish to serve these patrons are not afraid of providing what their costumers ask for.

Warning of explicit content! Dead Dove 🕊️

The White Lace Cafe is not a place for the lighthearted or gentle, but rather for the patrons who come for pleasure, in all its forms. The Cafe specializes in both food and drink, and even has a special menu for those with more… perverse tastes.

You can enjoy a drink accompanied by your meal... Have unforgettable experiences, and a great variety of desserts. All prepared by the most competent ladies of the Cafe... Or by their bodies.

Characters, obviously, over 18. Bon appetit.
creator: Zokage
